allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/feed"; "collectedAt: $\([DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeMilliseconds\($r.collectedAt\).LocalDateTime\)"; "status:"; $r.status | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.sourceId\): ok=$\($_.ok\) count=$\($_.count\)" }; ""; "통합 핫랭킹 TOP 8:"; $r.hot | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { "  🔥$\($_.score\) [$\($_.sourceId\)] $\($_.title\)" })
